hallucinations.description: The paper references multiple academic works with future publication years (2025), which cannot exist at the time of writing and indicate hallucinated or fabricated citations.
hallucinations.evidence: References such as 'Elastic Representation (ElRep) (Wen et al., 2025)' and 'Data pruning approaches (Mulchandani & Kim, 2025)' in Section 2.3.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations were found, primarily nonexistent/future-dated citations. The experimental results and methodology appear consistent with the provided code execution, but citation issues undermine credibility.
